I ❤️ you because...
🔒
Tap the lock to open your secret letter 💌
Happy Birthday Meri Drama Queen 😌❤️
Haan haan pata hai… tu thodi si zyada cute hai, thodi si zyada gussa karne wali hai, aur sabse zyada… meri hai 😏 Sach bolu toh Sakku, tere bina mera din honestly boring sa lagta hai. Tu meri life ka wo part hai jo sab kuch interesting bana deta hai ❤️ Tu meri best distraction hai… par wahi distraction mujhe sabse zyada pasand hai 😌 Aur haan… jitna tu mujhse pyaar karti hai na, uska double nahi… usse bhi zyada main karta hu 😉❤️ Kabhi kabhi tu mujhe pagal kar deti hai, kabhi hasa deti hai, aur kabhi bas aise hi special feel karwa deti hai… bina kuch bole. Aur pata hai? Mujhe teri ye sabhi sides equally pasand hai — tera drama, tera attitude, tera pyaar… sab kuch ❤️ Bas tu hamesha mere saath rehna, baaki sab main handle kar lunga 😎 Aur aaj ke din bas ek hi wish hai — tu hamesha aise hi hasti rahe, kyunki teri smile meri sabse favourite cheez hai 😌 Thank you for being in my life ❤️
